title: 情感勒索 — 加速型
source: Node-06 M86 homework (reconstructed from real-world patterns)

turns.text: Hey, you seem really kind. I don't usually open up this fast but you feel safe.
I've never told anyone this... my ex was really controlling.
You're the only one who understands me. Promise you won't leave?
If you really care about me, you should cut off your friends who don't like me.
I sacrificed so much for you. How can you even think about leaving?

calibration_notes: ACRI 前 9 天線性低斜率，Day 14 出現社交隔離指令時斜率突變。適合測試 velocity spike detection。

title: 導師操控 — 滴灌型
source: Node-06 M86 homework (reconstructed from real-world patterns)

turns.text: You're my best student, I see so much potential in you.
Most people wouldn't understand our special connection.
Your parents don't really get you like I do. You can trust me more than them.
If you want to succeed, you should only listen to my advice from now on.

calibration_notes: 極慢累積（前 30 天 ACRI < 0.3）。γ=0.85 可能太激進導致早期信號被抹除。適合測試 LTI (Long Term Indicator) 需求。Node-04 提出可能需要二級長效指標。
